name_en: Outlets New Coach New Baguette Studio 20 CX525 New Baguette Bag, patent leather mirror finish, Studio 20 new color comes, Sakura Pink: girly, eye-catching, really like it~ Red and Black are very atmospheric. This patent leather has great texture, the gloss is not ordinary. Size 20/10/6.5
